title: Experience Bottle Recycler
description: Experience Bottle Recycler (XPBR) is a lightweight Quality of Life (QoL) mod. Press "R" to open a GUI and convert 7 XP into an XP bottle. It's perfect for lightweight modpacks, offering a simple way to manage and store experience points.
body:
## **Experience Bottle Recycler** is a Quality of Life mod that enhances your Minecraft experience by offering an easy way to manage and store your XP. Key features include:



 - **Simple XP Conversion:** With a press of the "R" key, access a clean and intuitive GUI to convert your excess experience points into Bottles o' Enchanting.
 - **Cost-Effective:** Each XP bottle costs just 7 XP points, making it an efficient way to save your hard-earned experience for future use or share it with friends.
 - **Perfect for Lightweight Modpacks:** This mod is designed to integrate seamlessly into lightweight modpacks, providing added functionality without burdening your game with unnecessary complexity.
 - **Convenient XP Management:** Whether you’re preparing for enchantments, saving XP for later, or just looking to manage your experience points better, this mod offers a quick and convenient solution.
 - **Balanced Gameplay:** The mod ensures a balanced approach by setting a fair exchange rate for XP, making it neither too easy nor too difficult to store experience.
 - **User-Friendly:** The straightforward interface makes it accessible for all players, whether you’re new to Minecraft or a seasoned veteran.
  
**Add the Experience Bottle Recycler to your modpack to enjoy more control over your XP, enhance your survival strategies, and simplify your gameplay!**
